since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.32%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.74% · Gold +1.10% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.32%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.32%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.04%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +5.38%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +5.38%, MRVL +5.32%, MU +5.19%, LRCX +5.06%, AMAT +5.00%. Laggards: CRM -4.34%, IBM -4.10%, NOW -3.60%, EQIX -3.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.25% at $150.15
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.25% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
